text:
The e-mail address listed for the contributor of the printing section of the
  handbook is stale. Sean no longer works for plutotech.com. The following
  patch to en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/handbook/authors.ent will remedy the
  situation.

  Permission was given to me by Sean (friend from school) to send in the
  PR for the e-mail address change.

How-To-Repeat: 
  N/A
